## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for any behavior change (coverage stays ≥ 95%)
- [ ] Public API changes have full JSDoc (params, return, `@example`)
- [ ] A changeset was added if this changes published (`src/`) behavior — `npx changeset` (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#changesets-versioning))
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
